calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-23-2016 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Jan-25-2016 Off Calendar

Motion To Compel Compliance With Deposition Notice Requiring (I) Identification Of Potential Witnesses And (2) Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Sep-04-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. CHARLES J. WISCH, TEL. NO. 1-415-788-1945 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. TAMMY A. BROWN OF FOSTER EMPLOYMENT LAW, TEL. NO. 1-510-763-1900 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF JENI YANG'S Motion To Compel Compliance With Deposition Notice Requiring (I) Identification Of Potential Witnesses And (2) Production Of Documents.
1. DEFENDANT SHALL DISCLOSE THE WORK ADDRESSES AND TELEPHONE NUMBERS OF CURRENT EMPLOYEES PREVIOUSLY IDENTIFIED BEGINNING FROM 11/1/13 UNTIL SHE WENT ON LEAVE ON OR ABOUT MAY 1, 2014.; 2. DEFENDANT SHALL NOTIFY CURRENT EMPLOYEES PREVIOUSLY IDENTIFIED THAT PLAINTIFF SEEKS THEIR HOME ADDRESSES AND TELEPHONE NUMBERS AND SHALL AFFORD SUCH EMPLOYEES WITH AN OPPORTUNITY TO OBJECT IN WRITING TO DISCLOSURE THEREOF; 3. DEFENDANT SHALL NOTIFY FORMER EMPLOYEES PREVIOUSLY IDENTIFIED THAT PLAINTIFF SEEKS THEIR HOME AND WORK ADDRESSES AND TELEPHONE NUMBERS AND SHALL AFFORD SUCH FORMER EMPLOYEES WITH AN OPPORTUNITY TO OBJECT IN WRITING TO DISCLOSURE THEREOF; 4. DEFENDANT SHALL NOTIFY JOB APPLICANTS PREVIOUSLY IDENTIFIED THAT PLAINTIFF SEEKS THEIR HOME AND WORK AND TELEPHONE NUMBERS AND SHALL AFFORD SUCH JOB APPLICANTS WITH AN OPPORTUNITY TO OBJECT IN WRITING TO DISCLOSURE THEREOF; 5. THE PARTIES SHALL MEET AND CONFER AS TO THE FORM OF NOTIFICATION TO BE USED FOR COMPLIANCE WITH PARAGRAPHS 1 THROUGH 4 ABOVE; 6. DEFENDANT SHALL PRODUCE WITNESS IDENTIFICATION INFORMATION IN THE CATEGORIES SET FORTH ABOVE EXCEPT TO THE EXTENT THAT THE WITNESSES IN QUESTION HAVE OBJECTED TO SUCH DISCLOSURE; 7. DEFENDANT SHALL SERVE A FURTHER DISCOVERY RESPONSE THAT IT HAS NO RECORDS OF PRIOR COMPLAINTS OF PREGNANCY DISCRIMINATION OR SEX DISCRIMINATION BASED ON PREGNANCY FOR THE LAST TEN YEARS; 8. BOTH PARTIES' REQUESTS FOR AN AWARD OF SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/eg

Atty. SAM DAWOOD, ESQ. of Foster Employment Law, Tel No. 510-763-1900 appearing for Defendant Levi Strauss & Co.
